intro: Astragalus membranaceus glycerite is a liquid extract of the Astragalus membranaceus root, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. This glycerite is often taken as a dietary supplement to enhance overall health and resilience, particularly during periods of stress or illness. By dissolving the extract in a glycerin base, the Astragalus membranaceus glycerite is easily absorbed by the body, allowing its potential health benefits to be readily utilized.
